title: Burger Time
summary:
The weather was supposed to be cloudy and in the 40s the following day so we planned to spend the day milking the warmth and wifi of the climbing gym in Tahoe. We bouldered and worked for a bit and took advantage of the sauna and shower! As we left Tahoe we hit yet another big snowstorm but it cleared up as we got closer to Auburn and the drive down along the American River was beautiful as the sun poked through the remaining fog. That night we all (Abby included) stopped at Solid Ground Brewery, a Harvest Host, for the night where we played some games, ate a delicious burger and salad and then watched Beef on the projector in the van.

-Helen!
